name: Padded Slipcover Ottoman Blue - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add a stylish seating option to your entryway or hallway with this Slipcover Ottoman from Threshold designed w/Studio McGee. The square ottoman is upholstered in textured blue and boasts a padded seat cushion, inviting you to indulge in moments of pure comfort. Plus, the blue fabric slipcover adds an extra layer of elegance to complete the design. Whether positioned as an extra seat or a fashionable footrest in front of the sofa, this versatile ottoman enhances any space with its stunning design.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.

Overall Width: 29.3 inches
Overall Height: 19.3 inches
Overall Depth: 19.7 inches
